title: TEN_K_MASTER TAPER phase workout-family eligibility conflict

conflict.statement: TEN_K_MASTER TAPER eligibleWorkoutFamilies omitted QUALITY and RACE even though approved Golden Fixture v3 Week 12 contains both a QUALITY activation workout and a RACE workout in the TAPER phase. The master definition was corrected to allow EASY, LONG_RUN, QUALITY, and RACE.

validatorsConsuming.note: The only validator that reads PhaseDefinition.EligibleWorkoutFamilies. TemplateCombinationValidator and CatalogGraphValidator do not consult it directly.

versioningDecision.reason: TEN_K_MASTER v1 (contentHash c6cb0c0b4ebcfbdf946d97c9f03f1b8ec384abb68b8f0fa274a64a2eab9e5214) is already PUBLISHED and immutable in releases 1.0.0, 0.1.0-pilot, and 0.2.0-pilot.
versioningDecision.action: Created catalog/templates/ten-k-master.v2.json with the corrected TAPER family set; left v1 untouched.

tenKMaster.note: Incidentally matches after this correction; not a deliberate parity-forcing action — a new version was mandatory regardless due to immutability.

appselRacePlanV1.semanticImpact: unknown — rule pack policies/rules arrays are empty in this pilot, so no observable behavioral difference between v1/v2/v3 is evidenced
appselRacePlanV1.requiredFutureDecision: Dedicated review of what APPSEL_RACE_PLAN_V1 v2/v3 changed and whether this pilot's rule pack needs a version bump.
